queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of a negative checking account balance on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers associated with the absence of a formal checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the correlation between savings balances below 100 DM and reduced credit risk exposure.
